title: pachira rupicola
intro: Pachira rupicola is a species of flowering plant in the family Malvaceae, commonly known as the mountain water lily or mountain pachira. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and reducing fever. The health benefits of Pachira rupicola include its ability to improve cardiovascular health, reduce stress and anxiety, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into a tea or tincture, or used in combination with other herbs to create a medicinal tonic.
